overall.description: A third-person game engine scene showing a female character in a red shirt walking along a sandy beach with forested hills on one side and ocean with rock formations on the other. The character stops briefly before continuing and turning toward a large rock formation in the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with forested coastline

agents.ego_description: female character in red shirt walking steadily along the sandy beach parallel to the shoreline

entered.detail: expansive sandy beach with rippled texture stretching into the distance
calm blue ocean water along the left side of the beach
dense green forest covering the hillside along the right side
large rocky outcrop standing in the water offshore
smaller rock formation visible in the distance beyond the large rock
scattered white clouds against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide sandy beach with the ocean on the left and a forested hillside on the right. The large rock formation in the water gradually gets closer as the character moves forward under a bright sunny sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with forested coastline

events.description: character stops walking and stands still on the beach

agents.ego_description: character comes to a complete halt and stands still looking toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character pauses on the beach, standing still while facing the ocean and rock formations. The environment remains unchanged with the forested hillside to the right and calm waters to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with forested coastline

events.description: character resumes walking forward along the beach

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the beach toward the distant rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking along the sandy beach, continuing to approach the large rock formation which now appears closer on the left side. The forested coastline remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach approaching the water

events.description: character turns left to face the large rock formation in the water

agents.ego_description: character turns left toward the ocean and walks directly toward the large rock formation

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to face the ocean and walks toward the large rock formation, which is now centered in the view. The smaller rock formation shifts to the right side of the frame as the character approaches the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastline as a character progresses from a wide beach toward a prominent rock formation in the ocean. It begins with the character walking between a forested hillside and the water, with the distant rocks gradually growing larger in the frame. As the character pauses momentarily to face the sea, the surrounding landscape remains still before she resumes her forward motion along the sand. The scene then shifts as she turns left, leaving the forested coastline behind to walk directly toward the water's edge. Finally, the large rock formation centers in the view while a smaller rock formation shifts to the right as she approaches the surf.
